welcome_offer.description: Cashback Match — all cash back earned in first year is matched at year-end

earning_rates.notes: Rotating quarterly categories (Amazon, Grocery, Restaurants, Gas), $1,500 cap per quarter, then 1%

other_benefits.name: Cashback Match
other_benefits.description: First-year earnings doubled (effectively 10% on rotating categories, 2% elsewhere)

application_rules.notes: Cannot apply for second Discover card within 1 year of first card
